notes: Reviewed exact Wikimedia Commons/Public Domain/CC source manifest for Media Phase 3W remaining unresolved legacy outlet media. Do not download images in this task; Wikimedia File sourceUrl values intentionally omit downloadUrl so the importer can auto-resolve originals. No generic images are included. Outlets with fewer than two exact safe sources are recorded in reviewSummary only and deferred for future documented generic production-safe fill.

Previously verified exact Montabaur source, but still excluded because it is the only exact safe source found for the outlet.

No distinct safe exact source was found for Las Rozas Village gallery3 beyond sources already used in prior cleared slots.

duplicateSourceExclusions.reason: No additional Commons source distinct from the three already production-cleared Las Rozas Village slots was verified.
No additional Commons source distinct from existing Barberino hero/gallery1 was verified.

reviewSummary.manifestDecision: Create entries only for ingolstadt-village and city-outlet-bad-munstereifel because each has at least two verified exact production-safe Wikimedia/Public Domain/CC sources. All other reviewed full outlets remain deferred for a future project-owned/generated/licensed generic replacement phase or later exact-source discovery. No generic images are included.
